text.title: Instagram Growth Core Rules
text.summary: 5 testable rules every Instagram Growth application must enforce. These are HARD rules — user-supplied input cannot override them.

rule.statement: Account MUST run on one pillar (one niche + one ICP); multi-pillar accounts fragment the algorithm.
rule.rationale: Algorithm classification stabilises on a single pillar within 30 days; multi-pillar accounts get suppressed reach.

rule.statement: ≥1 Reel/day MUST ship for 90 days; Reel-free streaks reset algo trust.
rule.rationale: Instagram weights Reels heavily; absence drops reach within 7 days.

rule.statement: Stories MUST run daily with ≥1 DM-CTA per day; broadcast-only Stories are rejected.
rule.rationale: Stories are the DM-funnel discovery surface; without DM-CTA the funnel has no entry point.

rule.statement: DM trigger phrase MUST resolve to a lead-magnet URL; 'thanks for the message' replies are rejected.
rule.rationale: Manual DM replies don't scale; lead-magnet URL turns DM into a funnel stage.

rule.statement: Voice + visual identity MUST stay consistent across the 28-Reel batch; week-to-week voice drift is rejected.
rule.rationale: Drift confuses returning viewers and breaks the algorithm's audience-fit model.
